//: Local-only typecheck for the serverless functions (Node + ESM). NOT named tsconfig.json on purpose: a tsconfig.json inside /api makes Vercel's function builder honor its compilerOptions (incl. noEmit) and emit nothing → FUNCTION_INVOCATION_FAILED. Kept at the repo root under a custom name so Vercel never auto-applies it; run via `npm run typecheck:api`.
